context: Tests whether the agent correctly designs the unified financial data model for an ecommerce P&L dashboard, including the correct table schema, index strategy, P&L line item structure, period-over-period query pattern, and support for actuals vs. budget separation and fiscal calendar.

checklist.name: financial_facts table defined
checklist.description: Schema includes a financial_facts (or equivalently-named unified fact) table rather than separate tables per statement type

checklist.name: statement_type constraint
checklist.description: The statement_type column has a CHECK constraint restricting values to 'pnl', 'balance_sheet', and 'cash_flow' (or equivalent set)

checklist.name: fiscal_period column format
checklist.description: The fiscal_period column stores period in VARCHAR format (e.g., '2026-03'), not as a raw DATE

checklist.name: dimension columns present
checklist.description: The fact table includes channel, product_category, and geography as nullable dimension columns

checklist.name: amount precision
checklist.description: The amount column uses NUMERIC(14,2) or equivalent fixed-precision type, not FLOAT or DECIMAL without precision

checklist.name: Indexes on query dimensions
checklist.description: Indexes are created on at least fiscal_period, line_item, and channel columns

checklist.name: P&L line items
checklist.description: The P&L structure includes: Net Revenue, COGS, Gross Profit, Gross Margin %, EBITDA, EBIT, and Net Income as distinct line items (in SQL, documentation, or code)

checklist.name: Ecommerce-specific COGS sub-items
checklist.description: COGS breakdown includes product cost, inbound freight or shipping, and duties/tariffs (not just a single COGS line)

checklist.name: Period-over-period query pattern
checklist.description: Period comparison query uses two CTEs (or subqueries) joined on line_item, computing both an absolute variance and a percentage variance

checklist.name: NULL-safe variance_pct
checklist.description: Variance percentage calculation guards against division by zero (using NULLIF, CASE WHEN, or equivalent) and returns NULL rather than an error when prior period is zero

checklist.name: version column for actuals/budget
checklist.description: The data model includes a 'version' column (or equivalent field) that distinguishes 'actuals' from 'budget' or 'forecast' variants

checklist.name: Fiscal calendar dimension table
checklist.description: A separate fiscal calendar or dim_date table is defined (or described) rather than deriving fiscal periods from calendar dates inline

checklist.name: Pre-aggregated summary table
checklist.description: A monthly or period-level summary/aggregate table is defined alongside the raw fact table to serve dashboard queries efficiently

checklist.name: Chart of accounts mapping
checklist.description: A chart of accounts or account mapping table/structure is included to translate platform-specific categories to standard GL account codes
